mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tpl_template WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tpl_template WHERE template_code = #{templateCode} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tpl_template WHERE deleted = 0 AND template_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{templateName}, '%') AND module_type = #{moduleType} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tpl_template (template_code, template_name, module_type, description, current_version, status, create_by, update_by) VALUES (#{templateCode}, #{templateName}, #{moduleType}, #{description}, #{currentVersion}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{updateBy})
mapper.update:
UPDATE tpl_template
template_name = #{templateName}, module_type = #{moduleType}, description = #{description}, current_version = #{currentVersion}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE tpl_template SET deleted = 1, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
